requirements.summary: Deploy the current version of the SecurelyTime application to production on the Internet Computer network
acceptanceCriteria: The application is successfully deployed to the IC mainnet
The frontend is accessible via the securelytime.com domain
The backend canister is live and responding to search queries

file_operations.description: Verify production meta tags, canonical URL, and Open Graph tags reference the correct securelytime.com domain for mainnet deployment
Verify the backend canister connection configuration uses the production mainnet canister ID and host rather than local development settings
Verify the search interface correctly calls the backend search method and handles production error states appropriately
Verify the Google Search Console verification file is correctly deployed and accessible at its verification URL path for domain ownership confirmation
